channel.title: Hugo on MonkeMan's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Hugo on MonkeMan's Blog

item.title: What is PGP/GPG?
item.description: Info In this post, I provide an example of implementing digital signatures for blog posts. While this method works, I no longer use it due to a switch in my Hugo theme for my website. What is PGP/GPG? To quote Wikipedia, “Pretty Good Privacy (PGP) is an encryption program that provides cryptographic privacy and authentication for data communication.” It is widely used for sending encrypted emails, encrypting sensitive files and digitally signing files.

item.title: How did I created my website?
item.description: Info In this post, I provide examples with the PaperMod theme. While this method works, I no longer use this theme on my website. Many things in this post will also apply to other themes. How did I created my website? This post primarily serves as documentation for my website. Additionally, if someone finds something useful here, they are welcome to use it. The entire source code, including blog posts and their digital signatures, can be found on GitHub.
